synopsis:
"Probe Droid Problem" is a comic short story created by Chris Eliopoulos and Jordie Bellaire that was published in Darth Maul 1. It features a DRK-1 Dark Eye probe droid, and is set during the events of Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace.
Originnaly included as a back up story in Darth Maul (2017) #1
https://www.youtini.com/book/darth-maul-part-1
It was later collected in the one-shot Droids: Unplugged
https://www.youtini.com/book/droids-unplugged-1
title: Probe Droid Problem
